name: Roast Beef Sandwich
tagline: Pink-roasted top round on a Kaiser roll with horseradish cream

hero.alt: Tall roast beef sandwich on Kaiser roll with horseradish
hero.caption: roast beef — sliced thin, piled tall

steps.title: Whisk the horseradish cream
steps.detail: Stir sour cream, horseradish, mustard, salt, and pepper together. Taste — it should kick.
steps.tip: Make this an hour ahead if you can — flavors round out.

steps.title: Toast the rolls
steps.detail: Split rolls, toast cut-side until just golden. Adds structure to hold the meat juices.
steps.tip: A toasted roll = 50% less sog after assembly.

steps.title: Quick-warm the beef
steps.detail: Optional: warm sliced beef in a dry skillet 30 seconds — just to take the chill off. Don't cook further.
steps.tip: Cold roast beef is fine. Hot roast beef is better.

steps.title: Build and serve
steps.detail: Slather both halves with horseradish cream. Pile beef tall, top with red onion and arugula. Press lightly, slice, and serve.
steps.tip: Don't squash — air between slices is what makes a deli sandwich crave-worthy.

healthFacts: Top round is one of the leanest beef cuts — ~26g protein per 3oz, low saturated fat.
Horseradish contains glucosinolates similar to broccoli — pungent and clearing.
